== Notes for [[Item:Q87732|Q87732]] ==

* Fought in Sicily during 2nd Punic War.
* See http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaius_Octavius.
* Years 202-218bc

----------------------

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=elacey1&id=I41896

•ID: I41896 •Name: Caius OCTAVIUS I •Sex: M •Change Date: 19 NOV 2003 at 06:56:07

Father: Eneius Octavius Chancellor of the Republic RUFUS b: in Living about 330 BC

Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown Children 1. Caius OCTAVIUS II
--------------------
Fought in Sicily during 2nd Punic War, Years 202-218bc

"Knight"

He was a Knight.


wtf 4:565 Caius Octavius Knight

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
